languages.text: "Так что служащие в похоронных отделениях — одни из самых уважаемых специалистов. Да и задницей своей способны рискнуть, чтобы вернуть тело павшего в полк. Для нас это способ выжить".

"So, the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. They're even willing to risk their own hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. It's our means of survival."
languages.original_text: "Так что служащие в похоронных отделениях — одни из самых уважаемых специалистов. Да и задницей своей способны рискнуть, чтобы вернуть тело павшего в полк. Для нас это способ выжить".

traits.locale_text: "So the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. And they are willing to risk their hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. I's our means of survival."

"So, the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. They're even willing to risk their own hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. It's our means of survival."

"So the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. And they are willing to risk their hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. To you, I'm sure it sounds crazy. But to us, it's our means of survival. One person dies, but it means a few more will live? Now that's a deal any of us would gladly take."

"So the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. And they are willing to risk their hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. I's our means of survival."

"So, the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. They're even willing to risk their own hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. It's our means of survival."

"So, the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. They're even willing to risk their own hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. It's our means of survival."

languages.text: « Les membres des détachements funéraires sont parmi nos experts les plus respectés et ils sont même prêts à risquer leur vie pour ramener le corps d'un soldat au régiment. Pour nous, c'est une question de survie. »
languages.original_text: "So, the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. They're even willing to risk their own hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. It's our means of survival."

traits.locale_text: « Les membres des détachements funéraires sont parmi nos experts les plus respectés et ils sont même prêts à risquer leur vie pour ramener le corps d'un soldat au régiment. Pour nous, c'est une question de survie. »

languages.text: «Por eso, los soldados que sirven en los destacamentos funerarios están también entre nuestros expertos más respetados. Arriesgan incluso sus vidas para devolver el cuerpo de un camarada caído al regimiento. Es gracias a ellos que sobrevivimos».
languages.original_text: "So, the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. They're even willing to risk their own hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. It's our means of survival."

traits.locale_text: «Por eso, los soldados que sirven en los destacamentos funerarios están también entre nuestros expertos más respetados. Arriesgan incluso sus vidas para devolver el cuerpo de un camarada caído al regimiento. Es gracias a ellos que sobrevivimos».

languages.text: “所以，在殡葬分队服役的人，是我们最受尊敬的专家。他们甚至甘愿冒着生命危险，把阵亡士兵的遗体带回军团。这就是我们的生存之道。”
languages.original_text: "So, the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. They're even willing to risk their own hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. It's our means of survival."

traits.locale_text: “所以，在殡葬分队服役的人，是我们最受尊敬的专家。他们甚至甘愿冒着生命危险，把阵亡士兵的遗体带回军团。这就是我们的生存之道。”

languages.text: "Die Leute, die in den Bestattungsabteilungen dienen, zählen zu unseren angesehensten Experten. Sie sind sogar bereit, ihre eigenen Haut zu riskieren, um die Leiche eines gefallenen Soldaten zum Regiment zurückzubringen. So überleben wir."
languages.original_text: "So, the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. They're even willing to risk their own hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. It's our means of survival."

traits.locale_text: "Die Leute, die in den Bestattungsabteilungen dienen, zählen zu unseren angesehensten Experten. Sie sind sogar bereit, ihre eigenen Haut zu riskieren, um die Leiche eines gefallenen Soldaten zum Regiment zurückzubringen. So überleben wir."

languages.text: "Bu yüzden cenaze müfrezelerinde hizmet edenler, en saygıdeğer uzmanlarımızdan bazılarıdır. Ölen bir askerin bedenini alaya geri getirmek için kendi postlarını bile riske atmaya hazırdırlar. Bu bizim hayatta kalma aracımız."
languages.original_text: "So, the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. They're even willing to risk their own hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. It's our means of survival."

traits.locale_text: "Bu yüzden cenaze müfrezelerinde hizmet edenler, en saygıdeğer uzmanlarımızdan bazılarıdır. Ölen bir askerin bedenini alaya geri getirmek için kendi postlarını bile riske atmaya hazırdırlar. Bu bizim hayatta kalma aracımız."

languages.text: 「葬儀隊に所属している人たちは、我々の最も尊敬される専門家の一人です。そして、彼らは、自らの命を危険にさらして、戦死した兵士の遺体を部隊に返還するのです。あなたには、それは狂気じみたことのように聞こえるでしょう。しかし、我々にとっては、生き残るための手段なのです。一人死んでも、数人生き残るのです。これは、我々なら喜んで引き受ける取引です」
languages.original_text: "So the people who serve in the funereal detachments are some of our most respected experts. And they are willing to risk their hides to return a fallen soldier's body to the regiment. To you, I'm sure it sounds crazy. But to us, it's our means of survival. One person dies, but it means a few more will live? Now that's a deal any of us would gladly take."
